rows.label: qev015702_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey! Hey, hey, hey!
Sorry! Could you lend me a hand for a sec?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0002
rows.name:
We got attacked by native creatures during our job,
and my comrades got hit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0003
rows.name:
Our Dolls, our only lifeline, won't move either...
I'm sorry, but could you share some supplies with us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Wait, what!
You're a messenger from Sati![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0005
rows.name:
Geez, tell me that sooner...
Well then, could you hand over the supplies right away?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0006
rows.name:
I want to fix up the Doll quickly
and get back to work...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0007
rows.name:
Thank you!
You really saved us...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0008
rows.name:
I asked Sati for help, but I was actually
worried about how she was going to
deliver the supplies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'm impressed you managed to make it
all the way here safely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: NewText_11
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0010
rows.name: Say it's an easy task for a BLADE.

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0011
rows.name: Humble

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0012
rows.name: Say you were just lucky.

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0013
rows.name: Is that sarcasm directed at us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0014
rows.name:
If we hadn't run into that giant beast,
we'd still be whistling while we continued our work![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0015
rows.name:
Luck, huh...
I suppose in that sense, we might have just been unlucky.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0016
rows.name: To suddenly run into a giant beast like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0017
rows.name:
Tell me.
How did you manage to defeat that giant beast...
that Whim Guila bastard?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0018
rows.name:
Eh...?
Don't tell me you made it all the way here
without running into the Whim Guila!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0019
rows.name:
No way...
So, are you just extremely lucky,
or are we just terribly unlucky? Which is it...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0020
rows.name:
But... does that mean the Whim Guila
is still running wild and unchecked along this route!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0021
rows.name: That's bad...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0022
rows.name: Not all BLADEs are as lucky as you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0023
rows.name:
We need to subjugate the Whim Guila
before a team suffers even more severe damage than us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0024
rows.name:
How about it? Could you use that strong luck of yours
and take on the request to subjugate the Whim Guila?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0027
rows.name: I want to make that Whim Guila regret what it did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0028
rows.name:
You know full well the frustration
of being rendered immobile during a job, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0029
rows.name:
If so, under the pretense of securing the route,
help me clear some of my resentment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0030
rows.name:
Please, bring back a heroic tale
that'll make me feel refreshed...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0031
rows.name:
Hey! Hey, hey, hey!
Sorry! Could you lend me a hand for a sec?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0032
rows.name:
We got attacked by native creatures during our job,
and my comrades got hit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0033
rows.name:
Our Dolls, our only lifeline, won't move either...
I'm sorry, but could you share some supplies with us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Wait, what!
You're a messenger from Sati![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0035
rows.name:
Geez, tell me that sooner...
Well then, could you hand over the supplies right away?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0036
rows.name:
I want to fix up the Doll quickly
and get back to work...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0037
rows.name:
Thank you!
You really saved us...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0038
rows.name:
I asked Sati for help, but I was actually
worried about how she was going to
deliver the supplies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0039
rows.name:
But to hire a top-tier BLADE like you...
Sati's pretty capable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0040
rows.name:
Thanks to you, it looks like we can get back to work
without losing too much time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0041
rows.name:
We'll quickly install Data Probes at the
Frontier Net Spots around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0042
rows.name:
We've got to gather information on the native creatures
so there aren't any more victims like us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_JNK0010
rows.name: Support[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_SEL0011
rows.name:
Encourage them to continue doing
their best on the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_JNK0020
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about the Frontier Net Spots.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0043
rows.name: Yeah! Thanks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0044
rows.name:
Pathfinders are a Union filled with elites
even among BLADE, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0045
rows.name:
Average guys like me have to work many times harder than
others just to keep up.
I'll quickly fix the Doll and get back to the exploration mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0046
rows.name:
There's one by the shore of a lake
just a little northwest from here[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0047
rows.name:
And I also heard there's a likely spot
inside a cave to the northeast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0048
rows.name:
If things hadn't turned out like this,
I was hoping to make them our achievements, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0049
rows.name:
If you're willing to go that far,
I'll leave them to you. Be careful out there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0050
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Phew, even so, getting beaten by a monster like this
really makes you realize...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0051
rows.name:
We've crashed down onto
an absolutely outrageous planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0052
rows.name:
From now on, we have to keep fighting opponents
that can easily destroy even a Doll...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0053
rows.name:
If we don't act much more carefully and cautiously,
we won't have enough lives to spare.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0054
rows.name:
I'll brace myself from now on to make sure
I don't make a blunder like this again, and focus on the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015702_MSG0055
rows.name:
You do your best, too, alright?
Let's both survive, and survive, and survive...
and watch over the fate of humanity until the very end![ST:wait ]
